mnemonics: RESOURCE: Read, Evaluate, Select, Organize, Use, Review, Collaborate, and Educate for quality resources.
keyPoints: Identify authoritative textbooks and online materials relevant to the module topics.
Utilize official documentation and standards from recognized bodies (e.g., IEEE, ISO).
Engage with academic journals, industry case studies, and online courses for deeper understanding.
commonMistakes: Relying solely on unofficial blogs or forums without verifying information with primary sources.
Overloading on resources instead of carefully selecting a few high-quality ones, leading to confusion and inefficiency.
